title: Industrial Floor Coatings for Manufacturing Plants - Elite South Texas
content:
Manufacturing Plants
Protective coatings offer extreme durability to withstand heavy traffic and industrial machinery. Additionally, the ability of these systems to withstand chemicals and staining surpasses that of traditional industrial surfaces. Seamless flooring systems are fluid-applied in place and the installation process has a quick turn-around time. This results in less downtime, including during patch-and-repair maintenance. Vertical applications are available, including cove base and wall coatings for containment purposes.
Advantages
Impact and abrasion resistant
Slip resistant in wet or dry conditions for pedestrian and vehicular safety
Quick install, minimal downtime
Suitable for high forklift traffic and other heavy machinery
Easy to clean and maintain
Options for line striping, safety markings and equipment demarcation
For new construction and existing surfaces in need of repair and/or protection
Suitable for extreme hot and cold environments
Extreme temperature resistances
Custom colors to match company colors and branding themes
Stain and chemical resistance
Manufacturing
Loading docks
Warehouses
ESD Flooring
Paramount
Urethane Cement
